name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag in cream white patent leather. Cream white patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
name_cn:
!!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from top-quality leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. Light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and a matching strap with red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag in cream white patent leather. Cream white patent leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, handle (18cm high), detachable webbed shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4cm(D)
Color: Cream white patent leather / Original leather.
Made in Italy
Model height: 176cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet, and lipstick
